hero.name: Le Chi Luan
hero.title: Software Engineer
hero.bio: Software Engineer with nearly 3 years of experience designing and operating backend systems for high-volume e-commerce platforms. Proven track record in building scalable, fault-tolerant microservices and distributed workflows using Node.js and Python. Strong expertise in system performance optimization, asynchronous processing, and database efficiency.

about.description: Hello! I'm Le Chi Luan, a software engineer with a strong foundation in web development. My journey in tech began with a fascination for how digital products come to life, leading me to dive deep into various programming languages and frameworks. Over the years, I've honed my skills in front-end and back-end development, working with technologies like React, Next.js, Node.js, and various databases. I thrive in environments where I can solve complex problems and contribute to impactful projects. When I'm not coding, you can find me exploring new tech trends, contributing to open-source projects, or enjoying outdoor activities. I believe in continuous learning and always strive to improve my craft.

projects.name: VisAI - AI Claims Agent (Yes4All Hackathon)
projects.description: Developed an AI agent to assess delivery package damage and identify carrier vs. vendor responsibility, enabling claim verification for returned goods. Uses Computer Vision and OpenAI Vision.

projects.name: E-commerce System with Chatbot Integration
projects.description: Developed an e-commerce system for selling technology devices with chatbot integration and data analysis (Final Year Project). Features include product recommendations, export invoice, and chatbots using Django and Dialogflow.

responsibilities.title: Project SOMS (Sales Order Management System)
responsibilities.description: A backend system for automating order management, shipping carriers, invoicing, and transaction flows across multi-channel e-commerce platforms.
details: Integrated multiple global e-commerce platforms (Amazon Vendor, Amazon Seller, Walmart, Wayfair) and international logistics providers (USPS, UPS, FedEx) into a centralized order management system.
Wrote unit and integration tests using Jest and Mocha to ensure system reliability.
Implemented Apache Kafka to enable asynchronous, scalable communication between microservices.
Integrated Conductor to manage job execution and distributed workflows in microservices architecture.

responsibilities.title: Project Finpal
responsibilities.description: A driven financial analytics platform that transforms complex market and company data into clear insights for smarter investment decisions.
details: Designed and developed a microservice backend service using FastAPI.
Integrated OpenAI (function calling) into backend workflows to support financial analysis and automation. Optimized database queries to improve performance.
Deployed services on AWS EC2 (Ubuntu) with Nginx and automated CI/CD using GitHub Actions.

responsibilities.title: Project Opollo
responsibilities.description: A SaaS platform aggregating multiple third-party e-commerce platforms into a unified system for enterprise operations.
details: Developed and optimized features for order management, product, inventory, customer service, and purchase orders.
Integrated multiple e-commerce platforms (Shopee, TikTok Shop, Lazada) and local logistics providers (GHN, GHTK) into a centralized order management system.
Improved system performance and scalability across high-volume workloads.

responsibilities.title: Project Iris
responsibilities.description: Developed a dedicated live chat microservice extracted from the core Opollo system to handle message ingestion, storage, and delivery across multiple e-commerce platforms.
details: Implemented backend logic to receive, persist, and route customer messages from external marketplaces to the Opollo system in near real-time.

responsibilities.title: Project Aizen
responsibilities.description: Contributed to the development of an enterprise SaaS accounting system for a large construction corporation in Japan.
details: Designed and implemented backend APIs and corresponding user interfaces for core accounting workflows, collaborating with cross-functional offshore teams.

responsibilities.title: Training and Development
details: Developed full-stack web applications using MERN Stack.
Deployed applications on AWS EC2 (Ubuntu) and Cloudflare.
Implemented automation testing for several modules of the GCalls.

responsibilities.title: Project VoltaRocks
responsibilities.description: Designed a FastAPI backend to ingest, process, and serve government energy data collected through scraping and NLP pipelines.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science (BSc Hons) in Computing
notes: Top 3 Student - Computing Program From 2020-2023 (Consecutive Multiple Semesters)
Core team member of Google Student Developer Clubs (2022-2023)
Third Prize Greenwich Coding Challenge V3.1 (2022)
